hypothesis: Try Tweedie variance power=1.2 with num_leaves=256 and learning_rate=0.025. Previous experiments with Tweedie 1.2 at lr=0.03/0.04 and num_leaves=255/256/512 all scored around 0.94513. Reducing learning_rate further to 0.025 with more estimators may allow better convergence and generalization. This is a careful sweep of the lr dimension which hasn't been tried at 0.025.
